dataset.description: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).

columns.description: Unique name of the batter player with individual career statistics
columns.name: player_name

columns.description: Player's specialized role, always 'Batter' in this table
columns.name: role

columns.description: Cumulative runs scored by the batter across all matches
columns.name: total_runs

columns.description: Batting strike rate calculated as average runs per 100 balls faced
columns.name: strike_rate

columns.description: Total balls faced by the batter during their career
columns.name: total_balls_faced

columns.description: Wickets taken by the batter in occasional bowling innings
columns.name: total_wickets_taken

columns.description: Runs conceded by the batter in bowling spells
columns.name: total_runs_conceded

columns.description: Total overs bowled by the batter throughout their career
columns.name: total_overs_bowled

columns.description: Total matches the player participated in (as batter or other roles)
columns.name: total_matches_played

columns.description: Matches where the player was primarily a batter
columns.name: matches_played_as_batter

columns.description: Matches where the player bowled (zero for pure batters)
columns.name: matches_played_as_bowler

columns.description: Number of matches the player's team won during their participation
columns.name: matches_won

columns.description: Number of matches the player's team lost during their participation
columns.name: matches_lost

columns.description: Number of 'Player of the Match' awards received
columns.name: player_of_match_awards

columns.description: National or club team the batter represents
columns.name: team

columns.description: Batting average (total runs divided by dismissals)
columns.name: average

columns.description: Unique name of the bowler player with individual career statistics
columns.name: player_name

columns.description: Player's specialized role, always 'Bowler' in this table

columns.description: Cumulative runs scored by the bowler when batting (all-round performance)

columns.description: Bowling strike rate (average balls bowled per wicket taken)

columns.description: Total balls faced by the bowler in batting innings
columns.name: total_balls_faced

columns.description: Wickets taken by the bowler in their career
columns.name: total_wickets_taken

columns.description: Total runs conceded by the bowler across all matches
columns.name: total_runs_conceded

columns.description: Total overs bowled throughout the bowler's career
columns.name: total_overs_bowled

columns.description: Total matches the player participated in (as bowler or other roles)
columns.name: total_matches_played

columns.description: Matches where the player batted (zero for pure bowlers)
columns.name: matches_played_as_batter

columns.description: Matches where the player was primarily a bowler
columns.name: matches_played_as_bowler

columns.description: Number of matches the player's team won during their participation
columns.name: matches_won

columns.description: Number of matches the player's team lost during their participation
columns.name: matches_lost

columns.description: Number of 'Player of the Match' awards received
columns.name: player_of_match_awards

columns.description: National or club team the bowler represents
columns.name: team

columns.description: Average runs conceded per over bowled (economy rate)
columns.name: economy_rate

columns.description: Bowling average (total runs conceded per wicket taken)

desc: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).
goal: Analyze which individual player performances contribute most to match victories, focusing on the best players' batting and bowling statistics and their impact on the match outcome.
name: Visual Analytics System cricket_goal3_1742631321

plan.path: The user starts with View 1 (overview scatter plots) to identify players with strong batting/bowling impact correlations to win ratios. Selection of candidates propagates to View 2 (parallel coordinates) for multidimensional performance comparison. Brushed ranges in View 2 update Views 3-4 showing temporal trends and batting/bowling contribution breakdowns. The pipeline reveals top performers' evolution patterns and role-specific victory contributions.

effect.description: Highlight selected players and propagate selection to downstream views

visualization.description: Scatter plot matrix showing batting vs bowling performance impact scores relative to win rates. Facets separate batting and bowling perspectives.

effect.description: Filter players by performance range across dimensions

visualization.description: Parallel coordinates plot showing multidimensional performance metrics of top 50 players ranked by combined batting/bowling impact

views.components: Season range slider with tournament event markers

visualization.description: Dual-axis time series showing performance trajectory evolution with annotated tournament markers
Stacked bar chart showing relative batting vs bowling contribution percentages to wins

interaction.reason: Original match_summary data indicates match_type is exclusively ODI (unique=1). Filtering non-existent formats would create invalid SQL queries.
interaction.requirement: Remove match_type filter (only keep season range slider) since match_summary shows all matches are ODI type.

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW iapv_view AS SELECT dpd.player, dpd.match_outcome, dpd.wickets, dpd.runs, (dps.total_runs / dps.matches_played_as_batter) AS batting_impact, bps.total_wickets_taken AS bowling_impact FROM detailed_player_data dpd JOIN batter_player_stats dps ON dpd.player = dps.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bps ON dpd.player = bps.player_name JOIN match_summary ms ON dpd.match_id = ms.match_id
sqls.name: iapv_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW impv_view AS SELECT * FROM iapv_view
sqls.name: impv_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW impvs_view AS SELECT * FROM iapv_view
sqls.name: impvs_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW impdv_view AS SELECT * FROM iapv_view
sqls.name: impdv_view

tasks.method: Faceted scatter plots using D3-joined data: 1) X=batting impact score (runs × strike_rate/matches_played), Y=win ratio. 2) X=bowling impact score (wickets × (1 - economy/10)/matches_played), Y=win ratio. Team-level aggregation with lasso selection (I2) for multi-player comparison.
tasks.objective: Identify correlation patterns between calculated performance metrics and match victory rates

tasks.method: Parallel coordinates plot (V3) showing: Batting Impact, Bowling Impact, Win Ratio %, and Matches Played dimensions. Top 50 players filtered by sum of normalized impact scores. Color encodes team affiliation.
tasks.objective: Identify players with consistently high multidimensional performance across winning matches

tasks.method: Geospatial map of venues with embedded bar charts showing: 1) Average batting impact vs bowling impact 2) Win/loss ratio distribution. Linked to temporal slider (I3) for season filtering.
tasks.objective: Analyze how venue characteristics and seasonal variations affect player contributions to victories

tasks.method: Connected scatter plot with dual Y-axes: Batting impact score trajectory (line) and Bowling impact score trajectory (area chart). X-axis=season (I3 filtered). Annotated with major tournament markers from event_name.
tasks.objective: Track evolution of player performance impact on match outcomes over time

tasks.method: Stacked bar chart (V4) showing percentage contribution of batting/bowling metrics to team wins: X-axis=player, Y-axis=% contribution (batting_impact/(batting+bowling_impact)). Filterable by minimum matches played threshold.
tasks.objective: Quantify relative importance of batting vs bowling performance in securing match victories
